sentences.arabic: أَقَامَ مَرْكَزُ الشَّبَابِ وَرْشَةَ عَمَلٍ لِلطَّبْخِ.
sentences.translation: Omladinski centar organizovao je radionicu kuhanja.
sentences.translationEn: The youth center held a cooking workshop.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الشَّبَابُ طَرِيقَةَ طَبْخِ أَكْلَاتٍ شَعْبِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mladi su naučili kako kuhati narodna jela.
sentences.translationEn: The young people learned how to cook traditional dishes.

sentences.arabic: شَارَكَ عَشَرَةُ شَبَابٍ فِي هَذِهِ الْوَرْشَةِ.
sentences.translation: Deset mladih je učestvovalo u ovoj radionici.
sentences.translationEn: Ten young people participated in this workshop.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلُوا مَعًا مَا طَبَخُوهُ وَاسْتَمْتَعُوا كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Zajedno su pojeli ono što su skuhali i jako se zabavili.
sentences.translationEn: They ate together what they cooked and enjoyed it a lot.
